scripts.cap:build:dev: vite build --mode development && APP_ENV=development npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:ios:dev: vite build --mode development && APP_ENV=development npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:android:dev: vite build --mode development && APP_ENV=development npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
